purpose: Demonstrate a clean review-only mapping that does not claim conformance, interoperability, adoption, delegation, or execution authority.

claims.claim: This artifact can be independently reviewed as a boundary-mapping example.

non_claims: This artifact does not claim GLM conformance.
This artifact does not claim GLM compatibility.
This artifact does not claim adoption or endorsement.
This artifact does not claim runtime interoperability.
This artifact does not inherit authority by adjacency.
This artifact does not grant execution authority.
